one_time_description: Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada funding of $10,845,046 received in 2021 with no budget and no prior year equivalent
economic_notes: Fisher River Economic Development Corporation consolidated; Castle Building Centres investment; Fisher River Outfitters Ltd.; cottage lots inventory; VLT operations; grocery/fuel retail; Ochekwi-Sipi Personal Care Home Inc.; First Nations Healing Centre Inc.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Province is Manitoba. Large one-time Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada funding of $10,845,046 with no budget or prior year equivalent significantly inflated revenue and surplus. 14 consolidated entities including corporations and numbered companies. expenses_housing combines Housing ($1,264,474) and CMHC Housing Authority ($1,671,043). expenses_health combines Health Services ($4,749,336) segment. No remuneration schedule data extracted from text provided. Net debt position of $35,126,895. Long-term debt primarily First Nations Finance Authority.
